textByHash.01a012c874662672bbefcac4e621bd81a09b0fbf: I think you need to wear some sort of protective gloves, otherwise I'll flambé your arm.
textByHash.09579377d3040ec09ff4514cdaadd64e1f788391: Who are you? You're not the hero I gave my token to!
textByHash.25c8a0008d2d90d95ffe2bfc3b157eaf8aa35a25: Call me again when it's ready.
textByHash.2cbee9291bc80e3f67b4f68caf558ae9476275d7: Sorry, can't help. You'll have to ask the genie for that.
textByHash.6abe42dd92331eb0dc132f1da446707b3d8654b1: No horses in Gielinor. Try again.
textByHash.71145c531ebe380592927fb0af7d5f6adf908d9d: I suppose that seems fair. Alright, just call me when you need me.
textByHash.7486827d08bcf15d10b7fa98562983a1deaec273: The person who holds my token can summon me by rubbing it.
textByHash.8c98f3d9f254b77d723158c736d405bdb51877ca: That's right. What do you want?
textByHash.9229acd8d0ffe29b9616e39c6e8aa7a14028fca6: My name is K'klik. I am a Fairy Dragon.
textByHash.9c344c64ab4f824a8cc8cf7826e474f7fe382130: How did you get that coin you used to summon me?
textByHash.a42f233307bd57f2e736154d1b6298320954fe2e: A pair of ice gloves should do the trick.
textByHash.ae64cef6bbe3c966feefc28a141f54b84ad605f3: They then have the right to request one thing of me before returning my token.
textByHash.caac0c656c44ab9270f29287f51597f6c64ea973: One of the last surviving members of my race, I fear.
textByHash.df24e95e81f122f36a5949eac445f2d538320882: Enough of that: you summoned me, so how can I help?
textByHash.f1bb864a11776bc303f04f7fe820f0cf0e385cd1: That brûlée needs some more work before it's ready for flambéing.
